title: Shimmer Wall Backdrop Panels 24 Pcs Set - 30 x 30cm Silver Square Sequin for House of Party, Wedding, Anniversary Decoration
features: Set of 24 shimmer wall backdrop panels in a silver square sequin design for adding sparkle and glamour to your party or event.
Each panel measures 30 x 30cm, providing ample coverage to create a stunning backdrop for photos and decorations.
Perfect for use at house parties, weddings, anniversaries, or any special occasion where you want to create a festive atmosphere.
Easy to hang and arrange to customize the backdrop to fit your space and design vision.
Transform any space into a dazzling and elegant setting with these shimmering sequin panels.
description: Elevate the ambiance of your party or event with this set of 24 shimmer wall backdrop panels in a silver square sequin design. Each panel measures 30 x 30cm, providing ample coverage to create a stunning backdrop for photos, decorations, or as a focal point for your celebration. Whether you're hosting a house party, wedding, anniversary, or any special occasion, these shimmering panels add sparkle and glamour to the decor. Easy to hang and arrange, you can customize the backdrop to fit your space and design vision. Transform any space into a dazzling and elegant setting with these shimmer wall backdrop panels, creating a memorable and festive atmosphere for your guests to enjoy.
